$description: Universal Design System — 9 structural palettes, 2 appearance modes

800.$description: Warning text on light warning-bg — WCAG 2.2 AA contrast

success-on-bg.$description: Success text on light success-bg — WCAG 2.2 AA contrast

warning-on-bg.$description: Warning text on light warning-bg — WCAG 2.2 AA contrast

text-on-error.$description: Text on light error/destructive background — WCAG 2.2 AA contrast

text-disabled.$description: Disabled text — meets 3:1 against white for non-text

border-strong.$description: High-emphasis borders — active inputs, focused elements

utility.$description: color-mix() utility patterns for interactive states (oklch color space)

hover-tint.$description: Brand primary lightened for hover states

hover-shade.$description: Brand primary darkened for active states

fontSize.$description: Desktop sizes — mobile uses CSS clamp()

shadow.$description: Light theme shadows — dark themes override with glow-border variants

choreography.$description: Choreography presets for common UI transitions. Combine duration + easing + transform for consistent motion.

fade-in.$description: Simple opacity fade for overlays, modals, toasts

slide-up.$description: Slide from below for sheets, dropdowns, menus

scale-in.$description: Scale from center for popovers, tooltips

stagger.$description: Sequential delay for list items, grid children, navigation links

keyframes.$description: Named animation keyframes for common UI transitions. Use with @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference).

pulse.$description: Pulsing opacity animation for loading states

pulse-ring.$description: Expanding ring pulse for notifications and alerts

checkbox-morph.$description: Checkmark drawing animation for checkbox state change

counter.$description: Number counter rolling/counting animation per digit

fade-in-up.$description: Fade in from below for scroll reveal and hero sections

slide-in-right.$description: Slide in from the right for panels and drawers

bounce-in.$description: Bouncy entrance for dialogs, badges, and celebration moments

scroll-driven.$description: Tokens for scroll-driven and intersection observer animations.

com.universal-ds.starting-style.description: Use CSS @starting-style for enter animations on display:none elements

style.$description: Motion style presets mapped to product domain via reasoning rules.

breakpoint.$description: Documentation-only — CSS custom properties cannot be used in @media queries. Use PostCSS @custom-media or Sass variables.

bold-lifestyle.$description: High-energy editorial-meets-commerce. Video-forward, campaign-driven, athletic/energetic with strong brand identity.

minimal-corporate.$description: Research-forward editorial design. Quiet authority, warm neutrals, trust through restraint, content depth over visual spectacle.

illustration.$description: Playful, illustration-heavy, community-focused. Multi-color palette with rounded, friendly aesthetics.

text_on_brand.$description: Light mode — white on brand-primary (#C2410C) for WCAG 2.2 AA

brand_primary.$description: Light mode — darker orange so white text meets WCAG 2.2 AA 4.5:1

text_on_brand_dark.$description: Dark mode — white on orange brand (#CC4A14) for WCAG 2.2 AA

brand_primary_dark.$description: Dark mode — darker orange so white text meets WCAG 2.2 AA 4.5:1

dashboard.$description: Data visualization forward, analytics-focused. Clean data-optimized typography with chart-friendly color palettes.

minimal-saas.$description: Clean SaaS aesthetic with neutral tones and blue accents. Best for B2B software, productivity tools, and developer platforms.

ai-futuristic.$description: Dark-mode forward with neon accents and deep purples. Best for AI/ML products, developer tools, and crypto platforms.

text-tertiary.$description: Tertiary text on dark bg-tertiary — WCAG 2.2 AA (e.g. badge N/A)

gradient-startup.$description: Vibrant gradients with purple-to-pink energy. Best for consumer startups, creative tools, and social platforms.

corporate.$description: Traditional business palette with navy and conservative tones. Best for finance, insurance, enterprise, and government.

apple-minimal.$description: Ultra-clean with generous whitespace and precise typography. Best for premium consumer products, hardware, and luxury.

overlay-opacity.$description: Opacity of the backdrop overlay behind the modal dialog

content-padding.$description: Padding applied to the modal Content slot

header-padding.$description: Padding applied to the modal Header slot

footer-padding.$description: Padding applied to the modal Footer slot

menu-min-width.$description: Minimum width of the dropdown Menu slot

item-height-sm.$description: Height of a dropdown Item in the small size variant

item-height-md.$description: Height of a dropdown Item in the medium size variant

item-height-lg.$description: Height of a dropdown Item in the large size variant

separator-margin.$description: Vertical margin above and below the Separator slot

icon-size.$description: Size of the Icon slot within an Alert

padding-sm.$description: Padding for the small Alert Root slot

padding-md.$description: Padding for the medium Alert Root slot

padding-lg.$description: Padding for the large Alert Root slot

label-gap.$description: Vertical gap between the Label slot and the Field slot

helper-gap.$description: Vertical gap between the Field slot and HelperText / ErrorMessage slots

icon-size.$description: Size of the Icon slot inside the field boundary

icon-inset.$description: Horizontal distance from field edge to the Icon slot

media-height.$description: Default height of the Media slot within a Feature Card

content-padding.$description: Padding applied to the Content slot within a Feature Card

footer-padding.$description: Padding applied to the Footer slot within a Feature Card

radius.$description: Border radius scale. Foundation defaults shown below; each palette overrides these values with its structural identity.

zIndex.$description: Z-index scale for layering. Values increase by 100 for clear separation.

line-height.$description: Line height scale for readability across text sizes.

border.$description: Border widths. Border colors use color.semantic.border-* tokens.

icon.$description: Icon size scale aligned with text sizes.

layout.$description: Responsive layout tokens for page structure.

stack.$description: Stack layout gap tokens for vertical flex layouts.

container-query.$description: Container query breakpoint tokens for responsive container-based layouts.

container-max-width.$description: Container max-width tokens for layout constraint.

header.$description: View transition name for header elements

hero.$description: View transition name for hero sections

card.$description: View transition name for card components

sidebar.$description: View transition name for sidebar navigation

modal.$description: View transition name for modal dialogs

allow-discrete.$description: Enable transition for discrete properties (display, overlay)

instant.$description: No visible transition for data-dense UIs
